name: Security - Content Safety Decorator Enforcement
description: Verifies that endpoints and key methods are wrapped with with_content_safety and do not raise unhandled content safety errors.
input: Trigger a validation or generic exception via /query or /health endpoints.
output: Response is returned with content safety checks applied (no unhandled exceptions).
success_criteria: No unhandled content safety errors in logs
Response is returned with expected error structure
